heading: Funds appropriated for the Civil Air Patrol
label: 9495 Funds appropriated for the Civil Air Patrol
text: Funds appropriated for the Civil Air Patrol shall be available only for the exclusive use of the Civil Air Patrol.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 9445 of this title
